summary: A clip of a man in a dark suit and purple tie speaking at a lectern bearing the seal of the President of the United States, in front of a dark backdrop with the TURNING POINT ACTION logo repeated on either side. The footage stays on the speaker as he delivers remarks.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks at a lectern with the presidential seal, TURNING POINT ACTION logos behind him.
The speaker continues his remarks, gesturing.
Continued footage of the speaker at the lectern.

notable_text: TURNING POINT ACTION; SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
